window.basis: artifact and Git timestamps inspected during the audit
window.note: The inventory covers the rolling 24-hour evidence window ending on 2026-07-12. It does not infer execution from report publication time alone.

classification_definitions.VALID_MODEL_RESULT: A generation reached the model and retained enough request, response, or measurement evidence for a bounded result; quality may still fail.
classification_definitions.CONFIGURATION_FAILURE: The request failed before useful generation because of load, context, timeout, schema-grammar, or request configuration.
classification_definitions.RUNNER_FAILURE: The runner or supervision path failed independently of model behavior.
classification_definitions.PREFLIGHT_ONLY: Only readiness, load, token-fit, or cleanup evidence exists; no measured generation was attempted.
classification_definitions.SUPERSEDED_RESULT: A real retained result was replaced as the current evidentiary authority by a later corrected or canonical run.
classification_definitions.NOT_TESTED: The relevant generation cell has no retained execution evidence.

reconciled_denominators.warning: These denominators describe different experiments and include superseded retries and diagnostics. They must not be added into a single model-quality success rate.

raw_output_availability.derivation: 120 prompt-embedded overlay outputs (80 canonical plus 40 superseded E2B executions), 26 native-correction outputs including superseded and boundary runs, 30 long-representation canary/phase envelopes, 20 long-repeat envelopes, and 60 structured-repeat raw extracts. The same call may have both envelope and text files but is counted once.
raw_output_availability.caution: The artifact inventory confirms file presence, not semantic correctness. Private text was not copied into this report.

coverage_gaps.detail: No new production-shaped microphone call is present in the last-day closure; public text views are not audio-grounded evidence.
No complete real-video early/middle/late chunk, merge, and semantic-review pipeline was executed.
Fixtures or prompts exist, but no relevant Gemma result artifact closes translation quality.
No last-day vision generation belongs to the statistical closure. Earlier narrow route evidence remains historical and does not establish broad image understanding.
Loaded-session latency signals exist, but request-linked cache-hit or reused-token telemetry does not.
The last-day authoritative matrices used 28672 or lower contexts; load or fit checks are not exact-32k generation.
No repeat-5 A/B holds source, chunk boundaries, context, budget, and order constant while changing only representation.
The gpu-max comparison lacks a reliable per-layer offload read-back.

facts: The canonical prompt-embedded overlay executed 64 cells and 80 calls.
The native structured correction retained 12 authoritative matrix calls plus two E4B boundary calls.
The frozen long-representation plan contains 54 calls, while 27 phase call artifacts and three canaries are retained.
The repeat-5 closures retain 20 long-plain and 60 native-structured calls.
The compact-schema P4 repair retains 80 successful request summaries.
interpretations: A strict quality rejection remains a valid model result when generation and evidence are complete.
The P4 positional-schema failures are configuration failures because the measured requests returned HTTP 400 before useful generation and compact grammar repaired the lane.
Loaded-session speedup is a timing observation, not proof of physical KV-cache reuse.
hypotheses: Compact generic schemas reduce runtime grammar pressure enough to make bounded P4 viable on this setup.
12B QAT is the strongest next rehearsal candidate, but this remains conditional on product-shaped boundary and exact-surface validation.
